TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Blhuy, title = Blhuy, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Blhuy} }

S.FORM: Blhuy Itiniay i Fuxing Cen no Taoyuan ko Blhuy a niyaro', 97 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 285 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 2% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 7 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 98% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 278 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal 0.7%, Amis 1.1%, Paiwan 0.4%, Bunun 0.4%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Blhuy Itiniay i Fuxing Cen no Taoyuan ko Blhuy a niyaro', 11 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 43 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 86% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 37 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 14% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 6 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal 84%, Bunun 2%, roma 2%.
S.PHON: b~b~vɾħo~u~uj itiniaj i fo~u~uxiŋ ʦən no~u tao~ujo~u~uan ko~u b~b~vɾħo~u~uj a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, * ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ *.*%, amis *.*%, paiwan *.*%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *.*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. b~b~vɾħo~u~uj itiniaj i fo~u~uxiŋ ʦən no~u tao~ujo~u~uan ko~u b~b~vɾħo~u~uj a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, * ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ **%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, ro~uma *%.
S.FORM: Blhuy Itiniay i Fuxing Cen no Taoyuan ko Blhuy a niyaro', 97 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 285 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 2% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 7 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 98% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 278 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal 0.7%, Amis 1.1%, Paiwan 0.4%, Bunun 0.4%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Blhuy Itiniay i Fuxing Cen no Taoyuan ko Blhuy a niyaro', 11 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 43 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 86% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 37 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 14% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 6 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal 84%, Bunun 2%, roma 2%.
